name: Cajun Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Chicken wings, separated and cleaned
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the yogurt, hot sauce, and garlic powder.
2. Add the chicken wings and marinate overnight in the refrigerator.
3. The following day, mix together the flour and Cajun seasoning in another bowl.
4. Remove the chicken wings from the marinade and coat them evenly with the flour mixture.
5. Heat oil to 370°F (deeper fryer) or medium-high heat on a stovetop.
6. Ensure there is enough oil to cover about 4-5 chicken wings at a time.
7. Deep fry the wings for approximately 8 minutes, turning occasionally until golden brown and crispy.
8. Drain the wings on paper towels before serving.
9. Serves 2 to 4 people.
